    "prompt_snapshot": "## Issue description\r\n\r\nManager stats (wins, draws, losses, points) are never updated after a match\r\nresult is recorded. While team stats update correctly via db_games._delta(),\r\nthe equivalent write to the managers table is missing. Manager records stay\r\nat 0 permanently, regardless of match outcomes or score overrides.\r\n\r\nExpected: manager stats mirror team stats at all times.\r\nActual: manager stats remain 0 after every result.\r\n\r\n## Steps to reproduce\r\n\r\n1. Register two teams (db.add_team)\r\n2. Assign a manager to each team (db_managers.add_manager)\r\n3. Add a fixture (db_games.add_fixture)\r\n4. Save a score \u2014 e.g. 2-0 (db_games.save_score)\r\n5. Read back the manager record (db_managers.get_manager)\r\n6. Observe: mgr[\"points\"] == 0 while team[\"points\"] == 3\r\n\r\n## Expected behavior\r\n\r\n- After a win:  manager points == 3, wins == 1\r\n- After a draw: manager points == 1, draws == 1\r\n- After a loss: manager points == 0, losses == 1\r\n- After a score override: manager stats revert the old result and apply\r\n  the new one, staying in sync with the team (same as team stat revert logic)\r\n\r\n## Important TDD Rules\r\n\r\n- You MUST write tests BEFORE editing any source code. This is a strict requirement.\r\n- Write your tests in the appropriate test directory for this project i.e tests/ folder\r\n- Run your tests to confirm they FAIL on the current buggy code.\r\n- THEN implement the fix in the source code.\r\n- Run tests again to confirm they pass.\r\n- Make minimal, targeted changes.",
